settings.text: Four hand-wired JAM pedals circuits in one grab-and-go box
LucyDreamer overdrive, Eureka! fuzz, Harmonious Monk tremolo, Delay Llama delay
All analog, hand-built and hand-painted in Athens, Greece

settings.kicker: Hand-built by JAM pedals in Athens, Greece
settings.subhead: The Kochness Monster. Greg's essential overdrive, fuzz, harmonic tremolo and analog delay, fused into one orange clad warrior of the sonic night.
settings.microcopy: Ships fast. Hand-made in Athens, Greece.

settings.title: Drive and fuzz
settings.text: LucyDreamer dry-blend overdrive and Eureka! fuzz, from a gentle simmer to unparalleled savagery.

settings.title: Time and throb
settings.text: Delay Llama analog delay tap-synced to the Harmonious Monk harmonic tremolo. One tap controls both.

settings.heading: The board got out of hand
settings.body:
People of the Gristle Night, a confession. I met Jannis of JAM pedals back in 2009, and over the following fifteen years his hand-painted contraptions colonized my pedalboard one delicious circuit at a time.

Which presented a problem of physics. A board full of boutique pedals is a glorious thing right up until you have to haul it through an airport, and I am far too large a man to be seen weeping at a gate.

So we decided, let us make a couple of pedals together. One that is lean and mean with the bare essentials, and one that just has everything.

This is the lean and mean one. Four delicious flavors of JAM pedals glory to get the job done in the service of rock. Easy-peasy.
settings.caption: Greg Koch
settings.outro: All analog, hand-wired and hand-painted in Athens, Greece, and voiced to get any ax-slinger through any gig or session scenario with great aplomb.

settings.title: Four flavors of JAM glory
settings.text: LucyDreamer dry-blend overdrive, Eureka! fuzz, Harmonious Monk harmonic tremolo and Delay Llama analog delay.

settings.title: One-tap rhythm sorcery
settings.text: The delay's tap tempo syncs to the harmonic tremolo, with subdivisions on tap for otherworldly rhythmic textures.

settings.title: Throw and go
settings.text: One box, one power cable, zero patch cables. The fly rig that replaces the whole back-breaking board.

settings.title: Hand-made in Athens
settings.text: All analog, hand-wired and hand-painted by JAM pedals in Greece. No menus, no screens, no nonsense.

settings.heading: Lean, mean, orange
settings.subhead: The bare essentials, chosen by a man who owns entirely too many pedals.

settings.quote: I just listened to the whole demo. Great stuff.
Equipped with the essential set of effects to get Greg comfortably through any gig or session scenario.

settings.heading: Behold the Monster in action
settings.video_title: Greg Koch - Not So Slight Return! JAM Koch Ness Monster and more
settings.video_caption: Greg unleashes the Monster on his own channel
settings.testimonials_heading: What People Are Saying About the Kochness Monster

settings.quote_line2: orange clad warrior of the sonic night.”

settings.question: What exactly is inside?
settings.answer: Four JAM pedals circuits: LucyDreamer dry-blend overdrive, Eureka! fuzz, Harmonious Monk harmonic tremolo and Delay Llama analog delay. All analog, hand-wired, with the delay's tap tempo syncable to the tremolo.

settings.question: How is this different from the Supreme?
settings.answer: The Supreme carries all ten circuits of Greg's full rig, with wah, presets and expression inputs. This is the lean and mean edition, the bare essentials for any gig, at a fraction of the price.

settings.question: Who builds it?
settings.answer: JAM pedals, hand-made and hand-painted in Athens, Greece. It is the product of a fifteen year friendship between Greg and JAM founder Jannis Anastasakis.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes. International orders are responsible for customs and duties.

settings.question: What if it's sold out?
settings.answer: Join the waiting list and we'll email you the moment it's back in stock. These are hand-made in small batches, so the list moves fast.

settings.heading: Unleash the Monster
settings.smallprint: Hand-made in small batches. International orders responsible for customs and duties.
settings.waitlist_text: Leave your email and we'll let you know the moment the Kochness Monster is back in stock.
